summary: Contact-level ad audiences and MCP analytics for B2B marketers.
editor_note: The interesting choice is putting names back into ad targeting instead of hiding inside account segments. Vector shows visitor feeds, named buyer audiences, LinkedIn/Google/Reddit sync, 7.8% LinkedIn CTR, 17x ROI, and an MCP for asking campaign questions in Claude or ChatGPT. Unlike retargeting, it filters for exact ICP contacts already moving. The risk is that contact-level precision invites privacy pushback as fast as pipeline.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Vector: Contact-level ad audiences and MCP analytics for B2B marketers.
Vector shows visitor feeds, named buyer audiences, LinkedIn/Google/Reddit sync, 7.8% LinkedIn CTR, 17x ROI, and an MCP for asking campaign questions in Claude or ChatGPT.
